title: Riptide Everywhere
description: This mod allows you to use riptide in any whether condition.
body:
## 🌪️ Riptide Anywhere

Tired of waiting for rain or swimming in water just to use the **Riptide enchantment**?  
This mod removes those limitations and lets you enjoy **Riptide anytime, anywhere**!

---

### 🚀 What This Mod Does
- Enables the **Riptide enchantment in all weather conditions**
- No more dependence on rain, water, or thunderstorms
- Works seamlessly with vanilla gameplay mechanics

---

### 🌈 Why You’ll Love It
- Travel faster and more freely across the world
- Perfect for exploration, parkour, and custom maps
- Great for both single-player and multiplayer servers
- Lightweight and easy to use

---

### ⚙️ Features
- Fully compatible with existing Riptide tridents
- No configuration required — just install and play
- Designed to feel natural without breaking immersion

---

Whether you’re flying through the skies, exploring vast landscapes, or just want more freedom with your trident,  
**Riptide Anywhere** makes the enchantment useful in every situation 🌊⚡
